question_variants: What kind of university is this?
answers: DAV University is a private multidisciplinary university located in Jalandhar, Punjab. It offers UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma programmes in Engineering, Sciences, Commerce, Law, Agriculture, Pharmacy, Education, and more.
DAV University (established 2012) is a UGC-recognised university on the Jalandhar-Pathankot Highway. It follows NEP 2020 and has industry tie-ups with SAP, L&T EduTech, and IIT Mandi.

question_variants: What is the address of DAV University?
answers: DAV University is located on Jalandhar-Pathankot National Highway (NH 44), Sarmastpur, Jalandhar, Punjab – 144012.
DAV University is about 10 km from Jalandhar city centre. You can reach it by road via NH 44 (Jalandhar-Pathankot Highway). The nearest bus stop is at the main gate.

question_variants: Where do I go for admission?
answers: The Admission Cell is located in the Administrative Block on the ground floor of DAV University campus. From the main gate, follow the signboards to the Admin Block.
The Admission Office is inside the Administrative Block. It is open on all working days. You can apply online at admission.davuniversity.org and visit the Admission Cell for document verification.

question_variants: What is the process of admission?
How to get admission in DAV University?
answers: Step-by-step admission process: 1) Visit admission.davuniversity.org and register. 2) Fill the online application form and choose your programme. 3) Pay the registration fee online. 4) Download the Admission Guide for eligibility. 5) Appear for entrance test or submit merit. 6) Attend counselling/document verification at the Admission Cell. 7) Pay the semester fee to confirm your seat.

To apply: Go to admission.davuniversity.org → Apply Now → Register → Fill form → Pay registration fee. Admission is merit/entrance-based. Download the Admission Guide from the official site for full eligibility details.
Apply online at: admission.davuniversity.org — Click 'Apply Now', register with your details, fill the form, and pay the registration fee online.
Online admission portal: admission.davuniversity.org. Use 'Apply Now' to register. Existing applicants login via the 'Login' option. Registration fee paid at cca.davupay.com.

question_variants: What can I study at DAV University?
answers: UG Programmes: Engineering – B.Tech CSE, CS & AI, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Mechatronics (EV). Science – B.Sc Physics, Chemistry, Maths, Botany, Zoology, Microbiology, Biotechnology, Food Science. Commerce – BBA, B.Com, BBA Logistics. Law – B.A.LL.B. Agriculture – B.Sc Agriculture. Pharmacy – B.Pharm. Others – BCA, BA English, BA Journalism.

DAV University offers 25+ Bachelor's programmes. Top picks: B.Tech CSE, B.Tech CS & AI (with SAP), BCA, BBA, B.Com, B.A.LL.B, B.Pharm, B.Sc Agriculture. Also has industry programmes with SAP and L&T EduTech.

PG Programmes: Engineering – M.Tech CSE, Mechanical, Electrical, Structural. Computer – MCA, M.Sc CS. Sciences – M.Sc Physics, Chemistry, Maths, Botany, Zoology, Microbiology, Biotechnology. Commerce – MBA, M.Com. Law – LL.M. Agriculture – M.Sc Agriculture. Humanities – MA English, MA Psychology.
DAV offers 20+ PG programmes including MBA (also with SAP), MCA (with SAP), M.Tech in multiple branches, LL.M, MA English/Psychology, M.Sc Sciences, and M.Sc Agriculture specialisations.
DAV University offers PhD full-time and part-time in Engineering, CS, Sciences, Commerce, Law, Psychology, English, Agriculture, and more. Visit davuniversity.org/study-choice/doctoral-programmes.
PhD is available in 15+ disciplines including CSE, Mechanical, Civil, Physics, Chemistry, Maths, Biotechnology, Commerce, Law, and Psychology. Full-time and part-time options available.

Fees vary by programme. The Fee Structure for 2025-26 (new batch) PDF is at: davuniversity.org/src/library/2025/Fee_Installments-New-batch-2025-26.pdf. Pay fees online at davuniversity.org/uni/fee-payment.
The detailed fee structure for all programmes is on the official website. For 2025-26 batch: visit the Notices section or Fee Payment portal. Hostel and Transport fees are listed separately.
DAV University offers scholarships based on academic merit, sports achievements, and economic background. Details at davuniversity.org/innerpage/scholarships.
Scholarships are available for meritorious students, sports achievers, and economically weaker sections. Apply through the Scholarships page on the official website.

question_variants: What is the process of hostel facilities?
answers: DAV University has separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. To apply: 1) Fill the hostel allotment form at the Hostel Administration Office. 2) Pay hostel fee as per 2025-26 fee structure. 3) Allotment is on merit/first-come basis. Hostel Fee PDF: davuniversity.org/src/library/2025/2-Hostel-fee-2025-26-16-5-25.pdf

Hostel is available for boys and girls separately. Process: Apply at the Hostel Office after admission confirmation → Pay hostel fees → Get room allotted. Meals and modern amenities included. Contact the hostel warden for vacancy info.

DAV University provides bus transport from Jalandhar city and nearby areas. Process: 1) Visit Transport Office (near Admin Block). 2) Fill transport registration form. 3) Pay transport fee. 4) Get bus route and timings. Transport Fee 2025-26 PDF: davuniversity.org/src/library/2025/Transpot_fee_2025-2026.pdf
University buses connect Jalandhar city and surrounding areas. To avail: Visit the Transport Office on campus, check routes, register, and pay the fee. Call 1800-1800-190 for current route details.
